title: Pumpkin Pie Delight
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that makes pumpkin pies placeable and sliceable
body:
# Pumpkin Pie Delight

Farmer's Delight adds new pies that can be placed in the world, but the pumpkin pie didn't receive that same 3D treatment... **until today!** Place down your pumpkin pies, slice them, eat them, and craft them with pie crusts like the other pies. *Simply delightful!*

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AhcCiL7x/images/a5278c5b71189bd453563772434730c25504ae25.png)

## Recipes

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AhcCiL7x/images/c1830b5f3a17387abd6a2bf8e8facfd77c266130.png)

## Supported Languages

- Brazilian Portuguese (Kett)
- Chilean Spanish (Mudkip)
- Czech (unroman)
- English
- Polish
- Ukrainian (unroman)
